# Test fuzzing visualization
# Verifies that live visualization of fuzzing works correctly

# Start test server
mcp-server-start echoserver -- go run ./examples/servers/mcp-echo-server

# Test visualization with accepted scripts
env FUZZING_VISUALIZATION=1
exec go test -v -run TestVisualizationAccepted ./fuzzing
stdout 'Visualization enabled'
stdout '🟢 ACCEPTED'
stdout 'exec echo test'
stdout -regexp 'Total tested: [0-9]+'
stdout 'PASS'

# Test visualization with rejected scripts  
env FUZZING_VISUALIZATION=1
env FUZZING_SHOW_REJECTED=1
exec go test -v -run TestVisualizationRejected ./fuzzing
stdout '🔴 REJECTED'
stdout 'Error:'
stdout -regexp 'Accepted: [0-9]+.*Rejected: [0-9]+'
stdout 'PASS'

# Test visualization statistics
exec go test -v -run TestVisualizationStats ./fuzzing
stdout 'Acceptance rate:'
stdout 'Commands used:'
stdout 'Average script length:'
stdout 'PASS'

# Test visualization with coverage
env GOCOVERDIR=$WORK/coverage
mkdir coverage
exec go test -v -run TestVisualizationWithCoverage ./fuzzing
stdout 'New coverage:'
stdout '✨ NEW COVERAGE'
stdout 'PASS'
